parsed_output.justification: Mitchell is the most suspicious player, as his claims are completely inconsistent; he claims to be the Troublemaker, the Robber, the Tanner, and even the Werewolf in rapid succession. While Justin is also inconsistent regarding whether he switched players, he is corroborated by both Mike and Julie, who claim he was the Troublemaker. Mitchell's erratic behavior and explicit (though retracted) admission of being a Werewolf make him the most likely target for Team Village to eliminate.

validation.justification: Mitchell is the most suspicious player, as his claims are completely inconsistent; he claims to be the Troublemaker, the Robber, the Tanner, and even the Werewolf in rapid succession. While Justin is also inconsistent regarding whether he switched players, he is corroborated by both Mike and Julie, who claim he was the Troublemaker. Mitchell's erratic behavior and explicit (though retracted) admission of being a Werewolf make him the most likely target for Team Village to eliminate.
